title: Kom'rk Skirata
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|Kom'rk Skirata, originally known as Null-6|the [[Kom'rk-class fighter/transport/Legends|''Kom'rk''-class fighter/transport]], or other uses of the term "[[Null (disambiguation)|Null]]"|linebreak=1}} {{MultipleIssues|citation|updatecontent=[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image= |name=Kom'rk Skirata
"Null-6" |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Kamino |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] **[[Clan Skirata]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|So, nobody missed me. I'm gone a year, and nobody baked me a cake.|Kom'rk Skirata|''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''}} '''Kom'rk Skirata '''(pronounced KOM-or-rohk[[Star Wars: Republic Commando (soundtrack)|''Star Wars: Republic Commando'' soundtrack]]), originally known as '''Null-6''' or '''N-6''', was a [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. ==Biography== A year into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], along with [[Jaing Skirata]] and clone shadow troopers, he was one of the Clone Intelligence units responsible for locating [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. As Kom'rk and [[Jaing Skirata]] prolonged their search for General Grievous, they scouted and observed planets within the outer rim. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Kom'rk and Jaing came across information regarding General Grievous's affiliation with the [[Regent of Garis]]. They felt as though this came to them too easily and that [[Palpatine/Legends|someone]] wanted them to know that Grievous was based there, so they didn't report this information to their superiors until the end of the Clone Wars. Kom'rk deserted from the Grand Army of the Republic when [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued and went to live on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] with the rest of [[Clan Skirata]]. Soon after arriving, he discussed [[Etain Tur-Mukan]]'s [[Cremation/Legends|cremation]] and the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army's]] improved computer defenses with his Null ARC brother [[Ordo Skirata]]. ==Personality and traits== Kom'rk had a good sense of humor, just like all the other Null ARCs. He gave what he called a "crumb" to [[Kal Skirata]] to give to [[Arligan Zey]]. The chip which he gave Skirata was a recorded conversation between General Grievous and an ally they didn't know Grievous had, the Regent of Garis, minus the location. He told Skirata and his brother Nulls that he didn't want [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] or [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] charging in there and ruining the operation. ==Behind the scenes== Kom'rk means "gauntlet" in Mando'a. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: The Clone Wars (audiobook)}} {{C|Quoted only}} *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}} *{{InsiderCite|87|Odds}} {{Mo}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *{{Film|III}} {{Imo}} *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{NullARCsNav}} {{Interlang |de=Kom'rk Skirata |nl=Null-6 |pl=Kom'rk Skirata }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Skirata, Kom'rk}} [[Category:Clan Skirata]] [[Category:Clone trooper lieutenants]] [[Category:Galactic Republic deserters]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Null-class Advanced Recon Commandos]] [[Category:Special Operations Brigade personnel]]
